w:r.w:t: Strictly Confidential – For Official Use Only
I N S T R U C T I O N S

1. Answer all the questions completely; If the question is not applicable, write "N/A". Write "UNKNOWN" only if you do not know the answer and cannot obtain the answer from personal records. Use the blank pages at the back of this form for extra details on any question for which you do not have sufficient space.
2. Type, print or write carefully; illegible or incomplete forms will not receive consideration.
3. WARNING: The correctness of all statements of entries made herein will be investigated.
4. Any deliberate omission or distortion of material facts may give sufficient cause for denial of clearance.
5. The statements made herein are classified CONFIDENTIAL. Revelation or use other than the authorized is prohibited.
CHANGE IN NAME (If by Court Action give details):
Date & place of birth of spouse
Occupation / employer, contact, citizenship (state if dual)
VI. PLACES OF RESIDENCE SINCE BIRTH
Have you ever been dismissed or forced to resign? (explain)
Entirely dependent on salary? If NO, state other source of income:
Ever investigated, arrested, indicted, or convicted? (If yes: court, offense, disposition)
Immediate family member investigated or arrested?
Use of intoxicating liquor or illegal drugs
G. Copy exactly the following paragraph in your own handwriting:

As Luis E Repazo III of 105th Xavier Ave., Yale Mountain guzzled his way through three bottles of brandy, Josephine Z. Quinsing a partner in the law firm of San Diego and Ballesteros located at 2879 Valley Forge St., Quezon City turned to Richard Ting Sr., a chinese food expert from W. O. N. Kwantung Company Unltd., 346 Hadji Jairul Hussein Blvd., and said: "I can't speak for my Government but I'm quite sure your country and mine will be better together for closer understanding".

I certify that the following answers are true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief and I agree that my misstatement or omission as to material facts will constitute ground for denial of my application for clearance.
Subscribed and sworn before me (day, month, Philippines, place)
